Bus Timings

F50 Bus Timetable Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro to Al Salam Masjid and Return

August 4, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F50 offers a vital connection within the Jebel Ali area, linking key destinations between Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro and Al Salam Masjid. This service is essential for both daily commuters and residents, providing convenient and frequent travel options throughout the day. The route is designed to cover major residential and commercial zones, ensuring accessibility to various amenities and services.

Route Name F50
Route Description Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro - Al Salam Masjid  - Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro
Total Distance Approximately 19-20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 58 minutes
Operational Hours 03:31 to 02:33 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F50

Bus F50 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F50 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day and night, ensuring frequent service. Here are the departure times:

Bus F50 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or follow this link for F50 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F50 follows Dubai’s standard public transportation rates, with passengers able to use a Nol card for payment. The standard fare is AED 3, while discounted rates are available for students, senior citizens, and people of determination through the Nol card system. This ensures affordability and accessibility for a broad range of passengers.

Bus Booking

Passengers can simply board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For convenience and real-time updates, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app to check bus schedules and route information. This app provides an efficient way to plan your journey and stay informed about any changes or delays.

Bus Route

The Bus F50 route encompasses a comprehensive network within Jebel Ali, making numerous stops at significant locations.

  1. Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro

  2. The Green Community, West Gate Entrance

  3. The Green Community, East Gate Entrance

  4. The Green Community, Main Gate Entrance

  5. Choithram Supermarket

  6. AA Building

  7. Nibras International School

  8. Ewan Residence

  9. Dubai Lagoon

  10. Gulf News, DIP

  11. Pace Food Stuff Trading

  12. Arabian Orchard Complex A

  13. Arabian Orchard Complex B

  14. Arabian Orchard Complex C

  15. Arabian Orchard Complex D

  16. Dunes Village

  17. Fastner World International

  18. Dubai Pearl Gypsum Industries

  19. AMB Building

  20. DIP, Madina Supermarket Terminus

  21. Al Salam Masjid

  22. 63rd Street

  23. 74th Street

  17. Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro

Bus F50 Station Overview

Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro

Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro Station is a significant transport hub located within one of Dubai’s major business and industrial districts. It serves as a crucial intersection for Bus Routes F47 and F50, offering convenient connections to the Dubai Metro.

The station enhances connectivity for commuters traveling across different parts of the city and features modern amenities such as ticket counters, restrooms, and ample seating, ensuring a comfortable transit experience. Its strategic location provides easy access to various commercial, residential, and industrial areas within the DIP.

Al Salam Masjid

Al Salam Masjid bus stop is positioned near the prominent Al Salam Mosque, serving as a vital transit point for residents and visitors in the area. This stop on the Bus F50 route offers convenient access to the mosque and surrounding community facilities. It plays a crucial role in connecting local neighborhoods with major transport routes, facilitating smooth commutes for those attending religious services or visiting nearby businesses. The station’s proximity to Al Salam Masjid makes it a key point for both daily commuters and visitors.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus F50 route passes through several areas in Dubai, some of which are notable for their attractions and destinations. Here are a few points of interest along the route: 1.

  1. The Green Community: A well-planned residential area with parks and green spaces, offering a tranquil environment and family-friendly amenities.

  2. Dunes Village: This community provides a range of dining and shopping options, contributing to a vibrant local atmosphere.

  3. Dubai Investment Park (DIP): While primarily a business district, DIP has various commercial and retail outlets that can be interesting for visitors.

  4. Al Salam Masjid: A significant mosque in the area, offering cultural and architectural insights into Dubai’s Islamic heritage.

  5. Choithram Supermarket: A popular supermarket that might be of interest for those looking to explore local grocery shopping experiences.

These stops offer a mix of recreational, cultural, and shopping experiences, making the F50 bus route a convenient option for both tourists and residents to explore these areas.

Journey Experience

A trip on the F50 bus from Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro to Al Salam Masjid offers a long but fascinating journey through some of Dubai’s growing industrial and residential areas. Starting at DIP, a key hub for business and manufacturing, the route passes through well-developed zones that highlight Dubai’s blend of urban expansion and community living.

Along the way, passengers can catch glimpses of the bustling commercial activities in DIP and the surrounding neighborhoods, offering insight into the city’s diverse economy. As the journey nears Al Salam Masjid, a peaceful and serene spot, travelers experience the quiet, family-friendly atmosphere of this residential district. This route provides a comprehensive view of Dubai’s modern infrastructure and its mix of business and community-focused spaces.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can travel to Al Salam Masjid, the furthest point on the Bus F50 route, starting from Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro. The estimated fare for this journey ranges from AED 37 to AED 44, offering a convenient and comfortable way to reach this significant destination. Enjoy seamless travel with real-time updates and precise fare estimates through the app.

In conclusion, Bus F50 is a reliable and essential service for navigating Jebel Ali, connecting key residential and commercial areas with frequent, accessible stops. With its well-planned route and consistent schedule, it offers convenience for daily commutes and other travel needs. Passengers can enjoy the flexibility of using a Nol card for affordable fares and utilize the RTA Dubai app for real-time updates. Overall, Bus F50 enhances connectivity and ease of travel within the Jebel Ali region.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 4, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
